entry.title: I’m Not Derek.
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 933Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 103

Summary: Eddie stills for half a second, then his hand comes up, firm on Buck’s shoulder. “Hey. I’ve got you. What’s going on?” “I’m not Derek,” He repeats over and over, ‘I’m not Derek. I’m not -“

entry.title: Ink, Idiots, and Idiotic Soulmarks
entry.summary:
Author: aeternus_diamant

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,269Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 225

Summary: In a world where your soulmate’s thoughts occasionally appear on your skin in permanent ink, Evan Buck Buckley has somehow gone 30 years without getting a single mark.Which is honestly impressive, considering how much he thinks.Meanwhile, Eddie Diaz has been dealing with his soulmate’s marks for years—unhelpful, chaotic, and increasingly concerning messages that range from “Is cereal technically soup?” to “Oh no, he’s hot.”Eddie assumes his soulmate is a disaster.Buck assumes he doesn’t have one.Everyone else—Christopher Diaz, Bobby Nash, Henrietta Wilson, Howie 'Chimney' Han, Maddie Buckley Han, Athena Grant, and the rest of the 118—knows exactly what’s going on.Unfortunately, watching them figure it out is way more entertaining.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: In Color
entry.summary:
Author: aeternus_diamant

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,789Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Everyone is born with a mark on their skin — a symbol unique to the bond between two souls. They bloom in color the moment you come into the world, vivid as stained glass, as alive as a heartbeat.When your soulmate is near, the mark warms.When they find you, it blazes.When they die, it fades.Evan Buckley has carried a gray mark since birth. He has never known it to be anything else.

entry.title: Last chances and second glances
entry.summary:
Author: thebookofcrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 185,277Chapters: 55/60Kudos: 928

Summary: St. Anthony’s was his last chance, and Evan knew that. He had been kicked out of five schools in the past six years, and after his sophomore year ended with a meeting between his parents and his last headmaster that could be summarized with: “we’re not kicking him out, but just know that Evan is not welcome back in September.” His parents wanted to send him to military school.       Evan knew he couldn’t survive military school, that would be his last drop, the one that finally shattered the vase. He couldn’t be the type of person that would be able to put himself back together once they broke him down.     This had to work. . . . Buck is the new kid in an El Paso boarding school, trying his best to stay out of trouble. Eddie is a rockstar (in the world of high school popularity) he's captain to the football team, he's dating the most popular girl in school, and looking at a full ride sports scholarship in the fall. He should feel like he won at life, which is why he doesn't understand why the only time he feels alive is when he catches a glimpse of the new guy on the running team. Or in simpler terms: Buddie high-school AU!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Remember That Night?
entry.summary:
Author: InterrogateTheCat

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,486Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 260

Summary: He was going to watch her find the two seconds of nothingness. And he was going to want it. He was going to need it. He was tired of fighting. He was so unbelievably tired of being strong, of being good, of taking the punishment and hoping that someone, someday, would decide he was worthy of forgiveness, of love. Bobby didn't want him back at the 118. Eddie wouldn't look at him. His parents had never loved him. I wish I could say I feel nothing, Buck thought, a tear finally slipping through his fingers and dropping onto his jeans. But I feel everything. He sat in the darkness of the loft, listening to the shower run, waiting for the ticking clock to strike zero. He was going to relapse tonight. He had already made the choice. Now, it was just a matter of waiting for the moment to arrive. Or, Buck has been sober for six years, during the lawsuit, Buck relapses. 😭🥹💔💊 [You don't need to watch Euphoria to read this, based in the 911 universe, will have enough context about Rue to understand.]

entry.title: Not a Burden
entry.summary:
Author: RhyanneRose

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,230Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 135

Summary: We saw Buck apologize for taking up Athena's time in this week's episode, but I definitely don't believe she was the only one he tried to apologize to. Here's what I think would happen the first time he tried to apologize.~~“I’m so sorry.” He pressed his hands into his eyes, leaning forward to brace his arms on his legs, folding himself in half. He felt the bed shift underneath him as Hen sat down next to him, wrapping her arms around him. She let him sit in silence for a moment, before she spoke. “Do you remember…” she brushed a hand over his hair, “when we went to Bobby’s apartment, the year you joined the 118?”

entry.title: i’ll be your shelter (i’ll be your armor)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,039Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 199

Summary: That’s the worst of it, Buck thinks. It’s not the nausea, the chills, the nightmares that haunt him even in his waking hours. It’s this. It’s Eddie, dropping into the chair beside his bed with a quiet, patient nod. It’s Eddie, looking at him like he’s still him, like he’s still Buck. Eddie, refusing to treat him like the broken, ruined thing he is, ignoring the fact that Buck’s misery is of his own making, that he alone dug this grave of pills and lies and it’s his to lie in alone.a 9x15 coda

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: a few things Eddie finds while searching buck’s house
entry.summary:
Author: twobirdsonesong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,226Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 230

Summary: Buck is outside on the patio with Christopher, pale and flushed at the same time, sweating in the same hoodie he won’t take off. Eddie can see them playing cards, can see the glances Buck shoots him through the open doors – nervous even though Eddie’s certain they won’t find anything. He can’t be certain.or: a 9x15 coda

entry.title: the jaws of anger
entry.summary:
Author: magnoliamica

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,022Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 68

Summary: Eddie opens the door, and there is Buck. Even though Eddie is the reason they haven’t seen each other since he dropped Buck off at his house on the return from Nashville–from Los Nietos, and all that happened there–a weight lifts. When did this happen, how did he let this happen, that being without Buck is like moving under water, his limbs moving too slowly, the sound distorted, his body unmoored? Eddie opens the door, and there, uninvited, is Buck, and Eddie forgets for a moment why he has been ignoring Buck’s texts, why he hasn’t shown up to any of the invitations their friends extended to both of them since their return a week ago, why he made sure to drop off his short term disability forms to Chim when he knew Buck wouldn’t be at the 118 doing the same, why he even begged off of Hen’s replacement birthday party when she returned–he was the only one who had remembered last year, anyway, so it wasn’t that big a slight.And then Buck opens his mouth, and Eddie remembers._______________Eddie has been avoiding Buck since they have returned to LA after Buck’s kidnapping. Buck thinks he knows why; he does not.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Big Boy
entry.summary:
Author: WellHelloHello

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,842Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: Eddie scooped up some more food, but instead of making eye contact this time he lathered Buck’s neck in kisses, feeling him swallow under his lips.They carried on like that for five more minutes before Buck spoke again, “Have you eaten yet?”“Yeah, ate whilst I was cooking, I wanted to be able to focus just on you. Focus on feeding you, making sure you gorge yourself so you can get all big and strong.”“Fuck,” Buck whined, “Keep talking like that and I might not finish all this food.”“Oh yeah? Why’s that?” Eddie knew why, but he wanted to hear Buck say it.“I’ll be too busy fucking you.”Eddie’s face broke into a massive smirk, “Or we could do both.”orIt's bulking season for Buck, and Eddie is more than happy to help him out.

entry.title: The Buckley-Diaz Family Unit
entry.summary:
Author: Newbie429

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,066Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 20

Summary: In a world where there are male carriers that can also have children. Eddie is in for the surprise of his life when he finds out that he is pregnant after him and Buck slept together once. He tells Bobby straight away but resolves to keep the pregnancy a secret. What happens when the rest of the 118 find out?

entry.title: Addiction; A Deadly Disease
entry.summary:
Author: arianaarmy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,451Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Evan Buckley clings to his addictions as if it’s his life line. Dealing with his childhood trauma, his immense grief, chronic pain and self hatred he resorts back to his old ways with the addition of pills and alcohol. Like father, like son. I guess?

entry.title: we might be addicted to heartache
entry.summary:
Author: dreamthiefs

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,636Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 154

Summary: After the worst of it, with the rest of the 118 inside, Buck and Eddie finally talk. The elephant in the room is mentioned, they talk about why they don't talk.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Paint By Numbers
entry.summary:
Author: ziammybeloved

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,515Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: This is basically my take on what would have happened if Buck did actually overdose and Bobby was a ghost pulling some Grey's Anatomy type of move and convince Buck to keep going and keep living! Slight Buddie mentioned throughout the whole fic.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: pick your poison, babe, I'm poison either way
entry.summary:
Author: titaniclikeship003

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,196Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 136

Summary: “Evan.” Buck’s eyes flickered up to Eddie’s at the mention of his name, and his blue eyes, clouded with tears, met Eddie’s, brown and tear-filled, but with something else in them. That something he’d been searching for in Eddie’s face for years. That something more.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
